🚨NEW STUDY DROP🚨

Koumpiodontosuchus, a little croc from Lower Cretaceous England, was Micro-CT-scanned and its anatomy re-described. It's confirmed related to Bernissartia - together a sister group to all of Eusuchia, which includes all living crocs!

🎨: Mark Witton
